docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, KATRINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AYALIN, CRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAHAM, KATRINA $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,335.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

DEFT'S CLAIM FILING GIVEN TO MARIA.
